_readme: Chapter header images for Surviving the Singularity. Injected under chapter titles (above the epigraph) by `sts.py images --apply`. Files live in static/book-images/; licensing recorded in static/book-images/credits.json. Entries with `commons` (exact Wikimedia Commons file title) or `search` (Commons search fallback) are downloaded by `sts.py images --fetch` when the local file is missing. Licenses allowed: public domain, CC0, CC BY, CC BY-SA.

images.alt: Honda ASIMO humanoid robot, 2001
images.caption: ASIMO, 2001. The weirdness arrived on schedule.

images.alt: Boston Dynamics Atlas during DARPA testing
images.caption: Atlas during testing. The data does not care how you feel about it.

images.commons: File:Black hole - Messier 87 crop max res.jpg
images.alt: Event Horizon Telescope image of the M87 supermassive black hole
images.caption: The event horizon of M87. Past a certain line, there is no going back.

images.alt: Robotic arms assembling a car body
images.caption: Robotic arms at work. The structural automation of labor, already routine.

images.alt: Falcon Heavy lifting off from Kennedy Space Center
images.caption: Falcon Heavy demo mission. The exodus hardware is already flying.

images.commons: File:Hubble ultra deep field high rez edit1.jpg
images.alt: Hubble Ultra-Deep Field showing thousands of galaxies
images.caption: The Hubble Ultra-Deep Field. The available real estate.

images.commons: File:The Sun by the Atmospheric Imaging Assembly of NASA's Solar Dynamics Observatory - 20100819.jpg
images.alt: The Sun imaged by NASA's Solar Dynamics Observatory
images.caption: The Sun, via NASA's Solar Dynamics Observatory. The only income the planet has.

images.alt: Edmond de Belamy, the first AI-generated portrait sold at a major auction house
images.caption: Edmond de Belamy, generated by a GAN, sold at Christie's for $432,500 in 2018.

images.commons: File:Chess board with chess set in opening position IMG 5994.JPG
images.alt: Chess board set up in the opening position
images.caption: Opening position. The battle lines are drawn before most players notice the game started.

images.alt: Sophia, the humanoid robot by Hanson Robotics
images.caption: Sophia. The mirror humans keep flinching at.

images.alt: Desktop 3D printer mid-print
images.caption: A desktop 3D printer. The neighborhood factory fits on a workbench.

images.alt: The New York Stock Exchange trading floor
images.caption: The trading floor. The consumption engine you are stepping out of.

images.alt: Boston Dynamics Spot quadruped robot
images.caption: Spot. The same machines ending careers will happily work for you.

images.alt: FarmBot automated gardening system over a raised bed
images.caption: FarmBot over a raised bed. Land plus automation is the position to hold.

images.alt: Solar panels on a rural outbuilding roof
images.caption: Solar on an outbuilding. The Shouse Grid starts with one roof.

images.alt: Interior of an abandoned shopping mall
images.caption: A dead mall. Gradually, then suddenly.

images.alt: Automated watering over garden soil
images.caption: Automated watering over living soil. The substrate everything else depends on.

images.alt: Racks of servers in a data center
images.caption: Server racks. Code and media scale while you sleep.

images.alt: Workbench with hand tools
images.caption: The workbench. Own the tools, own the output.

images.alt: Topographic map with compass rose
images.caption: The map, before the route. Premortem first, then move.

images.alt: Sunrise seen from the International Space Station
images.caption: Sunrise from orbit. The new era does not ask permission.
images.commons: File:An orbital sunrise crowns Earth's horizon (iss072e340644).jpg
